claims.text: The AI Scientist generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, writes full scientific papers, and runs a simulated review process in an automated, iterative fashion.
claims.best_result: Papers exceeding acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference

claims.text: Extends automated scientific discovery with stronger search and review-like iteration, motivating stricter gates for novelty, experiment quality, and paper readiness.
Describes agentic research assistance across literature review, experimentation, and report writing, highlighting the need for human oversight and reproducibility controls.
Created a benchmark using Kaggle competitions to evaluate ML agents on real-world ML engineering tasks, using human baselines from Kaggle leaderboards and open-source agent scaffolds.
claims.best_result: OpenAI's o1-preview with AIDE scaffolding achieved at least the level of a Kaggle bronze medal in 16.9% of competitions.

claims.text: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving knowledge system for automatically building AI models, featuring a hierarchical organization of curated AI development knowledge with dynamic context loading.
Uses verbal feedback and memory to help agents improve across trials, motivating explicit failure memory and revision loops.
Studies iterative generation, feedback, and refinement, providing background for reviewer-style critique and revision policies.
Demonstrates open-ended skill acquisition with memory and iterative exploration, relevant to long-running agent loops and durable lessons.
Introduces agent evaluation tasks and motivates structured benchmarks for agent behavior rather than isolated text quality.
Shows how agents can operate computer interfaces to solve software tasks, relevant to local experiment execution and reproducible command logs.

Based on full paper reading: A hierarchical, evolving knowledge system that allows the agent to dynamically load relevant context and ground decisions in externally verifiable expertise while continuously learning from its own experiences.
